ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the player (e.g., leonaka01) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently affiliated with */,
  "first_year" INTEGER /* First year the player was active in the NBA */,
  "last_year" INTEGER /* Last year the player was active in the NBA */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's primary position */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches (e.g., 6-7) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number (if applicable) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Draft year (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the league */,
  "points_won" INTEGER /* Points won by the player */,
  "points_max" INTEGER /* Maximum points possible */,
  "share" REAL /* Share of the points (PTS Won / PTS Max) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares */,
  "win_shares_per_48_minutes" REAL /* Win shares per 48 minutes */,
  "all_star" INTEGER /* Selected as an All-Star */,
  "all_nba" INTEGER /* Selected to the All-NBA team */,
  "all_defense" INTEGER /* Selected to the All-Defensive team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Is this the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Finals MVP, Defensive Player of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the team was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_owners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, scout, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is affiliated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended with the team */,
  "head_coach" INTEGER /* Is this the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, knee injury) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "playoff_year" INTEGER /* Year of the playoffs */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., First Round, Conference Finals) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the playoffs */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pick (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
